title: Pedro Opens the Way
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Carrot, Reiju, Unknown person #6, Nami, Big Mom Pirates as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: Pedro chooses sacrifice so the crew can escape, forcing everyone to keep moving through grief.

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: Can't you hear Pedro crying that out?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nami, tell us what to do!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji and the others promised to come

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: From cacao Island via this route, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta make sure we don't just miss each other!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A slightly stronger wind will blow soon! We need it as a tailwind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll take the wind on our starboard side,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make a Beeline for the Render- Vous point!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll fill up the empty Cola barrels we used up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll take care of watching over the ocean currents!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Impossible! There's no way, I don't care what-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where the hell did zes get off to?! He's the one that's supposed to carry mama over the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, whatever. I just happened to have developed

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A rather profound hatred for these fools...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It doesn't bother me too much that I lost my right arm, no...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can just use candy to make up for it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But every time my right hand melts with the heat of a cup

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of the black tea I like to enjoy in the afternoon, well...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't help but remember it! The face of that blasted jaguar milk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you agree, Napoleon? There can be no shame greater than this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In my country, heinous criminals don't ac- tually have much of a future, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bloody cat's friends... how shall I make them suffer?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
